Abandoned/Feral apple orchard. Dense overgrown trees, but some still fruit in the Fall. They are just east of the Maxwell Creek fishing access parking lot. Find the path that goes into the dense tree area, not the path that follows the large creek/ fishing are

Grapes along edge of Maxwell Creek fishing access parking lot. State land. A little late in season, many past prime, but enough still good in late November to make a pie. Walk path into woods, many more in there. Access: Public.
